9:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s."School ID") AS charter_schools_count
FROM "Schools" s
JOIN "SAT Scores" sat ON s."School ID" = sat."School ID"
WHERE
    
    (LOWER(s."School Funding Type") LIKE '%charter%'
     OR LOWER(s."School Funding Type") LIKE '%чартер%')
    AND
    
    (TRY_CAST(sat."Average Score (Math)" AS NUMERIC) > 560);
13:
WITH sat_stats AS (
    SELECT
        s."School Code" AS school_code,
        s."School Name" AS school_name,
        s."Phone Number" AS phone_number,
        
        CASE
            WHEN NULLIF(TRIM(s."Num of SAT Test Takers"), '') ~ '^[0-9]+$' THEN CAST(TRIM(s."Num of SAT Test Takers") AS INTEGER)
            ELSE 0
        END AS num_test_takers,
        CASE
            WHEN NULLIF(TRIM(s."NumGE1500"), '') ~ '^[0-9]+$' THEN CAST(TRIM(s."NumGE1500") AS INTEGER)
            ELSE 0
        END AS num_ge_1500
    FROM
        "SAT_Scores" s
    WHERE
        
        NULLIF(TRIM(s."Num of SAT Test Takers"), '') ~ '^[0-9]+$'
        AND CAST(TRIM(s."Num of SAT Test Takers") AS INTEGER) > 0
),
excellence_rates AS (
    SELECT
        school_code,
        school_name,
        phone_number,
        num_test_takers,
        num_ge_1500,
        
        CASE
            WHEN num_test_takers > 0 THEN num_ge_1500::FLOAT / num_test_takers::FLOAT
            ELSE 0
        END AS excellence_rate
    FROM
        sat_stats
)
SELECT
    phone_number
FROM
    excellence_rates
ORDER BY
    excellence_rate DESC,
    num_ge_1500 DESC
LIMIT 3;
17:
SELECT
    s."School Name" AS school_name,
    s."Charter Number" AS charter_number,
    AVG(CAST(w."Writing" AS INTEGER)) AS avg_writing_score
FROM
    "SAT Scores" w
JOIN
    "Schools" s ON w."DBN" = s."DBN"
WHERE
    CAST(w."Writing" AS INTEGER) > 499
    AND s."Charter Number" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY
    s."School Name",
    s."Charter Number"
ORDER BY
    avg_writing_score DESC;
325:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "molecule_id") AS carcinogenic_nitrogen_molecules_count
FROM "molecule_elements"
WHERE "element" ILIKE '%n%'
  AND "molecule_id" IN (
      SELECT "molecule_id"
      FROM "molecule_labels"
      WHERE "label" = '+'
  );
276:
SELECT
    "atom_id" AS first_atom_id,
    "atom_id2" AS second_atom_id
FROM
    "bonds"
WHERE
    "bond_type" = '#';
498:
SELECT DISTINCT s."name" AS french_set_name
FROM "sets" s
JOIN "cards" c ON s."id" = c."set_id"
JOIN "translations" t ON c."id" = t."card_id"
WHERE t."language" = 'French'
  AND t."translation" LIKE '%Tendo Ice Bridge%';
417:
SELECT
    ROUND(
        (COUNT(CASE WHEN "language" LIKE '%Japanese%' AND "type" LIKE '%expansion%' THEN 1 END)::FLOAT /
        NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN "language" LIKE '%Japanese%' THEN 1 END), 0)) * 100,
        2
    ) AS percentage_japanese_expansion_sets
FROM
    "sets";
345:
SELECT DISTINCT
    l."status" AS legal_status
FROM
    "legalities" l
JOIN
    "cards" c ON l."uuid" = c."uuid"
WHERE
    
    c."type" LIKE '%Artifact%'
    
    AND c."side" IS NULL
    
    AND l."format" LIKE '%vintage%';
1533:
SELECT
    t."ClientId" AS client_id,
    c."ConsumptionStatus" AS consumption_status
FROM
    "Transactions" t
JOIN
    "Clients" c ON t."ClientId" = c."ClientId"
WHERE
    t."ProductId" = '5'
    AND t."Date" = '201208'
    AND (CAST(t."Price" AS NUMERIC) / NULLIF(CAST(t."Amount" AS NUMERIC), 0)) > 29.00;
1480:
SELECT
    t."yearmonth" AS peak_month
FROM
    "transactions" t
JOIN
    "customers" c ON t."customer_id" = c."customer_id"
WHERE
    
    t."yearmonth" BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
    
    AND c."customer_type" LIKE '%SME%'
    
    AND t."category" LIKE '%gas%'
GROUP BY
    t."yearmonth"
ORDER BY
    SUM(CAST(REPLACE(t."amount", ',', '.') AS NUMERIC)) DESC
LIMIT 1;
1529:
SELECT
    SUM(CASE WHEN t."MCC Description" LIKE '%GAS%' OR t."MCC Description" LIKE '%GASOLINE%'
              OR t."MCC Description" LIKE '%FUEL%' OR t."MCC Description" LIKE '%АЗС%'
              OR t."MCC Description" LIKE '%ЗАПРАВ%' THEN CAST(t."Amount" AS NUMERIC) ELSE 0 END) AS gas_station_spent,
    SUM(CASE WHEN TO_DATE(t."Date", 'YYYYMM') BETWEEN '2012-01-01' AND '2012-01-31'
             THEN CAST(t."Amount" AS NUMERIC) ELSE 0 END) AS january_2012_spent
FROM
    "Transactions" t
WHERE
    t."Customer ID" = '38508';
1472:
SELECT
    t."Country"
FROM
    "yearmonth" ym
JOIN
    "table" t ON ym."Yearmonth" = t."Yearmonth"
WHERE
    ym."Yearmonth" BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212'
    AND t."Region" LIKE '%LAM%'
GROUP BY
    t."Country"
ORDER BY
    SUM(CAST(REPLACE(t."Consumption", ',', '.') AS FLOAT)) ASC
LIMIT 1;
180:
SELECT DISTINCT
    c."client_id" AS "ID клиента"
FROM
    "clients" c
JOIN
    "accounts" a ON c."client_id" = a."client_id"
JOIN
    "branches" b ON a."branch_id" = b."branch_id"
WHERE
    
    TO_DATE(c."birth_date", 'YYYY-MM-DD') BETWEEN '1983-01-01' AND '1987-12-31'
    
    AND (
        b."branch_name" LIKE '%East Bohemia%'
        OR b."branch_name" LIKE '%Восточн%Bогеми%'
        OR b."branch_name" LIKE '%Východní Čechy%'
    );
113:
SELECT
    c."birthday" AS client_birthday
FROM
    "clients" c
JOIN
    "loans" l ON c."client_id" = l."client_id"
WHERE
    TO_DATE(l."loan_date", 'YYYY/MM/DD') = TO_DATE('1996/01/03', 'YYYY/MM/DD')
    AND REPLACE(l."loan_amount", ',', '')::numeric = 98832;
685:
SELECT
    SUM(CAST("ViewCount" AS INTEGER)) AS "total_views",
    "DisplayName" AS "last_post_user"
FROM
    "Posts" p
WHERE
    p."Text" LIKE '%Computer Game Datasets%'
    AND p."CreationDate" = (
        SELECT MAX("CreationDate")
        FROM "Posts"
        WHERE "Text" LIKE '%Computer Game Datasets%'
    )
GROUP BY
    "DisplayName";
1365:
WITH min_remaining_budget AS (
    SELECT
        "budget_id"
    FROM
        "budgets"
    ORDER BY
        CAST("remaining" AS DECIMAL) ASC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
    e."expense_description"
FROM
    "expenses" e
JOIN
    min_remaining_budget mrb ON e."budget_id" = mrb."budget_id";
1388:
SELECT
    s."first_name" || ' ' || s."last_name" AS full_name,
    i."source" AS income_source,
    CAST(i."amount" AS NUMERIC) AS income_amount
FROM
    "students" s
JOIN
    "income" i ON s."id" = i."student_id"
WHERE
    CAST(i."amount" AS NUMERIC) = (
        SELECT MAX(CAST("amount" AS NUMERIC))
        FROM "income"
    )
ORDER BY
    full_name;
1339:
SELECT AVG(CAST("amount" AS NUMERIC)) AS total_average_cost
FROM "expense" e
JOIN "client" c ON e."client_id" = c."client_id"
WHERE c."first_name" LIKE '%Elijah%'
  AND c."last_name" LIKE '%Allen%'
  AND TO_DATE(e."expense_date", 'DD.MM.YYYY') BETWEEN '2023-09-01' AND '2023-10-31';
1359:
WITH advertisement_budgets AS (
    SELECT
        "event_name",
        SUM(CAST("amount" AS NUMERIC)) AS total_amount
    FROM
        "budget"
    WHERE
        "category" = 'Advertisement'
        AND ("event_name" LIKE '%Yearly Kickoff%'
             OR "event_name" LIKE '%October Meeting%')
    GROUP BY
        "event_name"
),
budget_totals AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN "event_name" LIKE '%Yearly Kickoff%' THEN total_amount ELSE 0 END) AS yearly_kickoff_total,
        SUM(CASE WHEN "event_name" LIKE '%October Meeting%' THEN total_amount ELSE 0 END) AS october_meeting_total
    FROM
        advertisement_budgets
)
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN october_meeting_total > 0 THEN yearly_kickoff_total / october_meeting_total
        ELSE NULL
    END AS budget_ratio
FROM
    budget_totals;
1429:
SELECT DISTINCT e."event_name"
FROM "Student_Club" sc
JOIN "Club_Membership" cm ON sc."club_id" = cm."club_id"
JOIN "Person" p ON cm."person_id" = p."person_id"
JOIN "Event_Attendance" ea ON p."person_id" = ea."person_id"
JOIN "Event" e ON ea."event_id" = e."event_id"
WHERE e."type" = 'Social'
  AND cm."position" LIKE '%Vice President%'
  AND sc."location" LIKE '%900 E. Washington St%';
